title: Service Desk Knowledge Loop Monitor
summary: A replayable local view of synthetic tickets becoming a reviewed knowledge-base draft without rerunning the pipeline.

nodes.label: Incident Tickets
nodes.detail: 16 synthetic incidents with repeated VPN, password, and printer patterns.

nodes.label: Codex App
nodes.detail: Clusters recurring evidence and prepares a support-lead brief.

nodes.label: Codex CLI
nodes.detail: Applies scoped local repo edits and validation checks.

nodes.label: Runbook Repo
nodes.detail: Receives the VPN login failures runbook update.

nodes.label: Support Scripts
nodes.detail: Receives a dry-run helper script change for local validation.

nodes.label: Knowledge Base
nodes.detail: Collects reviewed runbook and script context into an agent article.

tickets.symptom: MFA completes but tunnel never opens
Token refresh succeeds only after cache clear

patternBrief.title: Pattern brief: VPN token refresh failures
facts: 4 VPN tickets share token refresh failure after successful MFA.
Resolver notes repeatedly cite stale local session state.
A similar network false positive was excluded from the cluster.
patternBrief.recommendation: Update the VPN runbook, add a dry-run session check, and draft a service-desk KB article for review.

fileChanges.summary: Adds current symptoms, triage steps, escalation notes, and ticket evidence.
Keeps dry-run behavior by default and reports local sample validation output.

knowledgeBase.summary: Agent-facing draft with symptoms, likely cause, steps, user wording, and escalation triggers.

timeline.label: Editing
timeline.detail: Codex CLI changes runbook and script

timeline.label: Ready for review
timeline.detail: Reviewer packet and KB draft converge
